description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat and partially gabled roof, featuring a spacious carport on one side that accommodates two vehicles. The front facade includes large windows, a central entryway with a small porch, and decorative elements such as a potted plant and a green wall. The rear of the house opens to a fenced backyard with a grassy area, a hot tub, and a wooden play structure, providing ample outdoor living space. The upper floor has a balcony overlooking the backyard, and the house is surrounded by a mix of paved and green surfaces. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored, with some sections featuring darker roofing materials and wooden fencing. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor areas, and a blend of privacy and openness.
description: A modern two-story house with a carport, large windows, a fenced backyard with a hot tub, and a balcony. The design features clean lines, light-colored walls, and functional outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport with two vehicles, main entryway with porch, large windows, and decorative plants.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain wall, upper balcony, and the transition to the backyard with wooden fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, grassy area, hot tub, play structure, and covered patio beneath the balcony.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the carport, side of the house, backyard fencing, and the connection between the front and rear outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a small porch, steps, overhang, and decorative potted plant
